sovereign_identity.issuing_authority: The Holy High Imperial House of DWD

certified_world_first_milestones.description: First successful fusion of Universal Decentralized Legal Identity (UDLI) with real-time settlement processes.
First planetary-scale 12-node quantum mesh operating as a singular, unified sovereign entity.
First global system to anchor a two-quadrillion-dollar ($2Q) valuation to 100% physical precious metal reserves.
First implementation of a BBR (Burn-Before-Read) protocol for real-time protection of sovereign assets and data.
First legal entity to successfully manifest absolute, plenary sovereignty across all its nodes and operational domains.

authority_summary_ratification.official_registration: Verified and registered under the supreme authority of HIH D.G.
authority_summary_ratification.legal_truth: Established upon immutable, foundational mandates that transcend legacy jurisdiction.
authority_summary_ratification.crown_true: Rooted in absolute cryptographic identity and hardware-level sovereignty.
authority_summary_ratification.real_time: Settlements and governance are executed with instantaneous, zero-latency precision.
authority_summary_ratification.validated_and_certified: Every structural and historical milestone has been audited as independent, sovereign, and secure.
authority_summary_ratification.live: The House maintains a state of perpetual vigilance and active governance over its global domain.
